---
title: "The mystery of Sheffield’s steepest hill"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2012). The mystery of Sheffield’s steepest hill. *Now Then*."
date: "2012-02-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_mystery_2012"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Now Then"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-47/hills/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This article explores the geography and local characteristics of the steepest gradients in Sheffield, UK. It likely combines terrain analysis with perspectives on the city’s unique urban topography."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Now Then
**Year:** 2012

[URL](http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-47/hills/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This article explores the geography and local characteristics of the steepest gradients in Sheffield, UK. It likely combines terrain analysis with perspectives on the city’s unique urban topography.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2012). The mystery of Sheffield’s steepest hill. *Now Then*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_mystery_2012,
	title = {The mystery of {Sheffield}'s steepest hill},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-47/hills/},
	abstract = {This article explores the geography and local characteristics of the steepest gradients in Sheffield, UK. It likely combines terrain analysis with perspectives on the city's unique urban topography.},
	journal = {Now Then},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = feb,
	year = {2012},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
